rationale: Both candidates correctly validate the unet addition and independently converge on the same structural point (hardcoded default_components duplicates pipeline-declared _dit_modules) — a reasonable but not exact match to dsocek's ground-truth concern about naming-conflict coverage via _packed_modules_mapping. X adds a more thematically apt second finding (text-encoder LoRA still silently no-ops), which echoes the ground-truth theme of incomplete coverage better than Y's weaker documentation/integration-test nits. Y is well-evidenced with grep citations but has a minor sloppy citation (conflating sensenova_u1 with pipeline_sdxl.py:543), slightly denting precision.
